metadata.description: Dummy village NPCs for geographic system villages. Placeholder NPCs that greet the player.
metadata.note: These NPCs are spawned dynamically by the village generator. They use the standard NPC system.

npcs.name: Farmer
dialogue_lines: Hi! I tend the fields around here.
The soil is good this season.
Have you seen any slimes nearby?

npcs.name: Guard
dialogue_lines: Halt! Oh, just a traveler. Carry on.
Keep your eyes open out there.
The roads aren't safe at night.

npcs.name: Merchant
dialogue_lines: Looking to trade? ...Not yet, I'm afraid.

npcs.name: Scholar
dialogue_lines: Ah, a fellow seeker of knowledge!
I've been studying the local wildlife.
Did you know slimes can split when threatened?
